strongestIdea: A Mobile First Read gate for Otis that forces phone-scale silhouette, expression, safe crop, text-band clearance, and gesture clarity before style ranking or full production proceeds.
uniquenessClaim: This lane stress-tests the approved threshold-keeper Otis against mobile Lobby failure modes instead of adding more ornament: it converts scale, crop, expression, text overlap, and gesture risks into concrete GPT Image 2 probes and QA acceptance rules.
qualityRisks: No actual GPT Image 2 source image files were generated locally in this lane.
Mobile safe text bands are inferred and should be checked against the live Lobby composition before promotion.
Safe low-gesture rules may make some poses too restrained unless balanced during image generation.
Contact sheet probes must not be treated as production sources without independent split-cell preflight.
fallbackReason: The requested GPT-5.5 fast mode with extra-high reasoning profile and a lane-local GPT Image 2 file-output path were not exposed in this session, so the lane produced prompt packets, preview spec, and QA guard artifacts only.
promotionBlockers: No production image files exist in this lane.
Generated Otis candidates must pass 64, 96, 144, 192, and 256 CSS px mobile scale rungs.
Generated Otis candidates must pass safe crop, dark/light alpha halo, and compact-phone text overlap checks.
Coordinator must run final review and promotion gates; this lane is not approved for app.
